rulings.Case Title: DONNA BONNER et al VS. GATEWAY APARTMENT PARTNERS, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED et al*****TRANSFERRED TO MARIN COUNTY*****
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue To County Of Marin
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, September 9, 2008, line 3. DEFENDANTS MICHAEL COVARRUBIAS, GATEWAY APARTMENT PARTNERS, LP, TMG PARTNERS, INC. AND J. DAVID MARTIN'S Motion For Change Of Venue To County Of Marin. The motion is granted pursuant to CCP 397. Defendants have presented declarations from non-party witnesses that support transfer. In addition, the property is in Marin County, records are in Marin County and building inspectors are also located in Marin County. Transfer the action to Marin County. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: LES JANKEY et al VS. SONG KOO LEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs; Memo Of P&A In Opposition To Motion For Attorneys' Fees
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, September 9, 2008, line 4. PLAINTIFFS LES JANKEY AND DISABILITY RIGHTS ENFORCEMENT, EDUCATION, SERVICES' Motion To Tax Costs is denied. Defendant's costs are recoverable. Molski v. Anciero Wine Group (2008) 164 Cal App 4th 786. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: PETER H GOSS VS. MARGARET SCHEINMAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, September 9, 2008, line 6. PLAINTIFFS PETER GOSS AND STEVEN BERLIN'S Motion To File First Amended Complaint is granted. The facts alleged as to the square footage have been the subject of the parties' litigation. The promissory estoppel cause of action is simply another legal theory based on the same facts. =(302/PJM/PB)
